creator: garga@FreeBSD.org
text:
Exactly what i've suspected, your ports tree is out-of date, comparing
$FreeBSD$ lines of Mk/* files i can see a lot of new versions that you don't
have.

One of this versions of bsd.port.mk added --mandir as a default parameter on
CONFIGURE_ARGS, that's the reason it works fine for me and a lot of other
people and don't for you.

Please, update your ports tree, i'm closing this PR.

Here is the diff:

--- versions.tmp	2008-05-26 11:06:16.000000000 -0300
+++ version2.tmp	2008-05-26 11:06:28.000000000 -0300
